item.title: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets. n.pr/3RrQ0mO
item.content:encoded: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets. n.pr/3RrQ0mO

item.title: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Ot…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country. n.pr/4b4ruz0
item.content:encoded: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country. n.pr/4b4ruz0

item.title: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked so…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans? n.pr/4fpdgKa
item.content:encoded: In 1994, the last men's World Cup the U.S. hosted sparked soccer fever, from youth leagues to TV broadcasts to the formation of MLS. Now, can MLS harness this World Cup for a new generation of fans? n.pr/4fpdgKa

item.title: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic. n.pr/4bBrXsz
item.content:encoded: Worry no more about wildfire smoke and $10,000 ticket prices. Sunday's final between Argentina and Spain — the first meeting of their transcendent stars — is here and seems destined to be a classic. n.pr/4bBrXsz

item.title: The brothers were taken into custody on a sealed warrant, th…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The brothers were taken into custody on a sealed warrant, the Marshals Service told the AP. British prosecutors said they were seeking the extradition of the brothers on rape and trafficking charges. n.pr/4yqyjEY
item.content:encoded: The brothers were taken into custody on a sealed warrant, the Marshals Service told the AP. British prosecutors said they were seeking the extradition of the brothers on rape and trafficking charges. n.pr/4yqyjEY

item.title: Tune into World Cup coverage, and you are likely to see wave…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Tune into World Cup coverage, and you are likely to see waves of male, screaming, sweaty fans. But one of the joys of covering this World Cup has been speaking to women who love soccer. n.pr/4fnZHL4
item.content:encoded: Tune into World Cup coverage, and you are likely to see waves of male, screaming, sweaty fans. But one of the joys of covering this World Cup has been speaking to women who love soccer. n.pr/4fnZHL4

item.title: At Mosswood Meltdown, Pavement covered “Stairway To Heaven” …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
At Mosswood Meltdown, Pavement covered “Stairway To Heaven” with made-up lyrics.

Back in 2020, Stockton-bred Stephen Malkmus ranked the tracks on ‘ZoSo,’ placing “Levee” at #6. (California issued the country’s first stay-at-home order the next day. Coincidence?)

stereogum.com/2505676/pave...
item.content:encoded:
At Mosswood Meltdown, Pavement covered “Stairway To Heaven” with made-up lyrics.

Back in 2020, Stockton-bred Stephen Malkmus ranked the tracks on ‘ZoSo,’ placing “Levee” at #6. (California issued the country’s first stay-at-home order the next day. Coincidence?)

stereogum.com/2505676/pave...

item.title: A T-rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest specimen…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A T-rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million to a mystery bidder. But many aren't happy about it.
item.content:encoded: A T-rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million to a mystery bidder. But many aren't happy about it.

item.title: Kerr announced his bid to break the world record months in a…

item.title: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been walking around with spinach in your teeth. Here are tactics to quickly defuse your most embarrassing, cringe-inducing moments.
item.content:encoded: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been walking around with spinach in your teeth. Here are tactics to quickly defuse your most embarrassing, cringe-inducing moments.

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska's cultural scene from federal budget cuts. But a massive state deficit is putting its future in jeopardy.
item.content:encoded: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska's cultural scene from federal budget cuts. But a massive state deficit is putting its future in jeopardy.

item.title: Metal-pop star Poppy was a no-show to her Upheavel set, due …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Metal-pop star Poppy was a no-show to her Upheavel set, due to the air quality.

Her band played an instrumental set without her while wearing N95 masks under their regular masks.

Then Gojira took stage with a drummer named Luigi filling in for Mario.

stereogum.com/2505648/popp...
item.content:encoded:
Metal-pop star Poppy was a no-show to her Upheavel set, due to the air quality.

Her band played an instrumental set without her while wearing N95 masks under their regular masks.

Then Gojira took stage with a drummer named Luigi filling in for Mario.

stereogum.com/2505648/popp...

item.title: Just in: Two U.S. service members were killed in action wh…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Just in:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.
item.content:encoded:
Just in:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.

item.title: Wildfire smoke and unhealthy air persist and shift direction…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Wildfire smoke and unhealthy air persist and shift direction, as Trump demands explanation from Canada.
item.content:encoded: Wildfire smoke and unhealthy air persist and shift direction, as Trump demands explanation from Canada.

item.title: Clairo has shared a new track to benefit the climate justice…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Clairo has shared a new track to benefit the climate justice organization Zero Hour
item.content:encoded: Clairo has shared a new track to benefit the climate justice organization Zero Hour

item.title: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, takes on the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing good health.
item.content:encoded: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, takes on the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing good health.

item.author: NME Home - Music, Film, TV, Gaming & Pop Culture News [Unoffici… (@nme.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November at the John Waters-hosted Mosswood Meltdown. Following "Harness Your Hopes," they broke out a very unserious cover of "Stairway To Heaven" with Stephen Malkmus singing all incorrect lyrics. (At one point he definitely sang "I like mangos.")
item.content:encoded: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November at the John Waters-hosted Mosswood Meltdown. Following "Harness Your Hopes," they broke out a very unserious cover of "Stairway To Heaven" with Stephen Malkmus singing all incorrect lyrics. (At one point he definitely sang "I like mangos.")

item.title: Which nu metal album had the biggest impact on this subgenre…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: Which nu metal album had the biggest impact on this subgenre of rock?
item.content:encoded: Which nu metal album had the biggest impact on this subgenre of rock?
